holdings.infoBox: IWS is an equity ETF with a total of 715 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 2.73%, Western Digital at 2.01%, Corning at 1.33%, Cummins at 0.85%, and The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation at 0.82%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell Mid-Cap Value ETF (IWS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell Midcap Value index. The fund tracks an index of US mid-cap value stocks. The index selects from the bottom 80% of the Russell 1000, screened for value factors. IWS was launched on Jul 17, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
